is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study analyses P. falciparum parasites from placental and venous blood; Pfcrt exon 2 sequencing.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Pfcrt exon 2 codons 74, 75, 76 reported (CVMNK/CVIET haplotypes, K76T mutation) — codons 74, 75, 76 are curated target positions.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Frequency of 76T: 92% venous and 93% placenta; 42/69 individuals harboured 76K in periphery vs 10/59 in placenta; single-allele haplotypes CVMNK n=11, CVIET n=87; venous/placental proportions given.

sub_country_location.evidence: Samples collected at maternity ward of Guediawaye, a suburb of Dakar — a specific sub-national site/town.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: 'Samples were collected... during 2000 and 2001' — a two-year collection window (<=3 years).

african_field_samples.evidence: Human placental and venous blood field samples from pregnant women in Dakar, Senegal (Africa); residents declaring no travel outside the area.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical study with 692 women recruited, sequencing of Pfcrt exon 2 in field isolates.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Study cites related work in same Dakar setting (Schleiermacher 2002, Sarr 2006) but this is a distinct 2000-2001 collection; mentions additional 96 samples sequenced. No explicit consortium/subset statement.

supplement.evidence: Frequencies and site are in main text and tables/figures; no supplementary data pointer for finer detail.

assessment.summary: Study of Pfcrt exon 2 (codons 74/75/76, CVMNK/CVIET) in matched placental and venous blood from pregnant women in Guediawaye, suburb of Dakar, Senegal, collected 2000-2001. Full sequence obtained for 141 samples (72 peripheral, 69 placenta). Reports extractable K76T frequencies (93% placenta, 92% venous) with numerator/denominator counts by compartment.
